content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch delta against 2e54e84499c17f6d5cfafe87ff0d6ee5068770e8, ignoring .ralph-burning runtime state. Targeted propose_new_bead tests, clippy, fmt, and nix build passed; one disabled-policy correctness gap remains.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:5212 and src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:5310 still perform pre-create bead discovery in the threshold-met path when workflow.parsimonious_bead_creation.enabled=false. The disabled-policy branch only short-circuits below-threshold proposals; once current_count >= threshold, handle_propose_new_bead calls br list, derives matching_beads, and can reuse an exact title/rendered-description match before create. That means the feature flag does not fully satisfy the acceptance case that disabled policy skips existing-bead lookup while still enforcing the threshold, and a br list/show failure can block creation even though the lookup policy is off.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: Disabling parsimonious bead creation should leave threshold enforcement in place without letting existing-bead discovery affect whether the new bead is created.
